zh.lifeSummary: 當SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON於1225年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾巴洛諾可時，他的父親SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON56歲，母親LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK35歲。他於1274年之前與MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1293年在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON于1225年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾巴洛諾可时，他的父亲SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON56岁，母亲LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK35岁。他于1274年之前与MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1293年在苏格兰登巴頓史爾享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: HAMILTON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: habitational name from what is now a deserted village in the parish of Barkby, Leicestershire. This is named from Old English hamel ‘crooked’ + dūn ‘hill’. Hamilton near Glasgow was founded by the English Hamiltons and named after them, and later bearers took their surname from the Scottish place. In the north of Ireland, where many Hamiltons settled in the 17th century, this surname may sometimes have been adopted for Hamill . It has also been adopted as an Anglicized form of southern Irish Ó hUrmholtaigh.

History: This name is borne by one of the most distinguished families of the Scottish nobility; they hold many titles, including marquessate and dukedom of Hamilton, the marquessate of Douglas, the dukedom of Abercorn, and the earldom of Haddington. They are descended from Walter FitzGilbert de Hameldone, a Norman baron who gave his support to Robert the Bruce in the 13th century. A member of this family was Sir William Hamilton (1730–1803), a British diplomat and archaeologist, whose wife, Lady Emma Hamilton (c. 1765–1815), became the mistress of Admiral Horatio Nelson. A branch of the family was established in Ireland by Sir Frederick Hamilton (died 1646), who served in the Swedish army of Gustavus Adolphus. He later became governor of Ulster, and his descendants were created viscounts Boyne. The family have given their name to Newtownhamilton and Hamiltonsbaron in County Armagh. Another branch of the family were to be found in Denmark, where Henrik Albertsen Hamilton (1588–1648) was a noted Latin poet. A 17th-century example of a Hamilton from Glasgow, Scotland, is recorded in the Netherlands, where the name is found in the form Hamelton. Another Scottish Hamilton, James, went to the West Indies in the 18th century and was the father of Alexander Hamilton (1755–1804), who arrived in NY in 1772 and became the first US secretary of the Treasury.

variants.name: Hamill
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Haineville or Henneville in Manche, France, named from the ancient Germanic personal name Hagano + Old French ville ‘settlement’.
English (Lancashire): nickname for a maimed person or someone with a distinctive scar, from Middle English, Old English hamel ‘mutilated, scarred’.
Irish (Ulster): according to MacLysaght, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÁdhmaill ‘descendant of Ádhmall’, which he derives from ádhmall ‘active’.

nameMeanings.name: GILBERT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

nameMeanings.name: FITZWILLIAM
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

en.lifeSummary: When SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON was born in 1225, in Balornock, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON, was 56 and his mother, LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK, was 35. He married MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH before 1274, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1293, in Dunbartonshire, Scotland, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON est né en 1225, à Balornock, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON, avait 56 ans et sa mère, LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH avant 1274, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1293, à Dunbartonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON 1225 in Balornock, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON 56 und seine Mutter LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK 35. Er hat vor 1274 in Scotland MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1293 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Dunbartonshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON è nato il nel 1225 nel Balornock, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH prima del 1274, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1293, nel Dunbartonshire, Scotland, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTONが1225年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアボーオルノックで生まれた時，父SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTONは56歳，母LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCKは35歳であった。1274年以前にスコットランドでMABEL ISABEL RANDOLPHと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1293年にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON(이)가 1225년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 밸로른옥크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1274년 이전 스컷랜드에서 MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1293년 스컷랜드 던바토실르에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON nasceu em 1225, em Balornock, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH antes 1274, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1293, em Dunbartonshire, Scotland, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON родился в 1225 г. в местности балорнокк, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH перед 1274 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1293 г. в местности дунбартоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando SIR GILBERT FITZWILLIAM HAMILTON nació en 1225, en Balornock, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, SIR WILLIAM DE HAMILTON, tenía 56 años y su mamá, LADY MARY DE HAMILTON OF BUTHERNOCK, tenía 35 años. Se casó con MABEL ISABEL RANDOLPH antes de 1274, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1293, en Dunbartonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 68 años.
